description:
In this step, you will create courses (subjects) such as Mathematics, Physics, English, and other academic subjects offered by your institute.

Courses form the core of your academic structure and are used across programs, timetables, assessments, assignments, and report generation. Each course represents a subject that students will study within a program.

While creating a course, you can define assessment criteria and weightages (for example: Assignments, Mid-Terms, and Final Exams). These criteria are used to calculate final grades and generate report cards.

After creating courses, they must be linked to one or more programs using the Program Course mapping. This ensures that each class (program) knows which subjects are applicable to it.

Proper course setup is essential for timetable generation, instructor assignment, and academic evaluations.
name: Create Courses (Subjects)
title: Course Setup
